Video Games.body:
First played: Dec 2025
Playthroughs: 2
My shop is named 'Yaki Nomi Balls'

03/2025.body:
I got my breakout boards for the pcm1794a DAC and the opa1612 opamp. I have to solder them. I have soldered small components before, but nothing as small as these. I need to go to the store and see if they have:
- Solder flux
- Solder
- Fine tip for a soldering gun
- A regulated soldering gun with a temp gauge
- Another breadboard
- Capacitors

It’s about 10 days into the commission. I’ve made successful progress in creating a custom audio player interface as well as other interactable UI elements in this wonderfully gray, blocky, nostalgic style. Suprisingly, I landed at using the Apple Music API to power it. Hopefully I’ll be done with the project in the next few days. It will be beautiful to create a documentation page. I cannot wait to share the whole project.

05/2026.subheader: Today will mark the day of a new website restructure. I have more time on my hands, and I am very depressed. I have been playing 'Factorio' to breathe a new life.
